title: Vanilla Reimagined
description: A modpack that aims to provide better performance and enhance the overall experience of vanilla Minecraft without significantly altering the gameplay.
body:
# Vanilla Reimagined

This modpack is a collection of mods, that are aimed to give you a better and smoother Vanilla experience without majorly changing overall gameplay.

It took its inspiration from Fabulously Optimized, but adds more than just a performance optimizations.

Exception being [FallingTree](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingtree) and [Terra](https://modrinth.com/plugin/terra).

And by using [Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) it makes it easier to play with friends.
